summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Mauro Ferrante Consulting Studio website. Backend APIs functional with minor validation issue. Frontend fully operational with excellent user experience, multilingual support, and successful form integration.

minor_bugs.issue: Form validation accepts invalid data (empty fields, invalid email) when it should reject them
minor_bugs.impact: Low - form still saves data and provides fallback mailto functionality

ui_bugs.issue: Widget toggle button not clickable due to emergent-badge overlay intercepting pointer events
ui_bugs.workaround: Widget buttons in hero section and contact section work perfectly

passed_tests: Contact form submission saves to MongoDB and returns mailto fallback
All service mappings work (pm, digital, re, other)
Homepage loads with all sections (Hero, Services, Reviews, Contact, Footer)
Language switcher works for all 5 languages (EN, IT, ES, FR, DE)
Hero section with typewriter effect and animated stats counters
Services section with 3 working tabs (Project Management, Digital Marketing, Real Estate)
Contact form with validation and successful submission
WhatsApp buttons in hero and contact sections work
Navigation smooth scrolling to all sections
Footer with working CTA and social links
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fix needed: Add proper form validation in backend /api/contact endpoint to reject invalid data (empty fields, invalid email format). WhatsApp widget overlay issue is cosmetic and low priority.
